---
title: "Hopes and Fears, or, Scenes from the Life of a Spinster. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Heartsease,” Etc."
---

## Hopes and Fears, or, Scenes from the Life of a Spinster. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Heartsease,” Etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1860
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: John W Parker and Son, West Strand.

### Notes

The Rev. Robert Fulmort and other characters recur in <i>The Pillars of the House.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
